# Hybrid Design System — Generated by Ditto

> Blended from 2 inspirations
> Generated on April 12, 2026

## Inspirations
- [Come a Casa](https://comeacasa-5zaaa.ondigitalocean.app/) — weight: 50%
- [Slack | Piattaforma di lavoro basata sull'IA e strumenti di produttività](https://slack.com/intl/it-it/) — weight: 50%

## Mood Profile
- **Tono**: Giocoso (-0.3)
- **Formalità**: Bilanciato (-0.2)
- **Energia**: Audace (+0.7)
- **Temperatura**: Freddo (+0.8)
- **Densità**: Bilanciato (0.0)
- **Forma**: Morbido (-0.4)
- **Profondità**: Bilanciato (-0.2)
- **Palette**: Bilanciato (+0.2)
- **Tipografia**: Bilanciato (0.0)
- **Movimento**: Cinematico (+0.7)

## Font Setup

### Fonts Used
- **Heading**: `Poiret One`
- **Body**: `field-gothic-wide`
- **Mono**: `ui-monospace`

### CSS Custom Properties
```css
:root {
  --font-heading: 'Poiret One', system-ui, sans-serif;
  --font-body: 'field-gothic-wide', system-ui, sans-serif;
  --font-mono: 'ui-monospace', ui-monospace, monospace;
  --font-weight-heading: 800;
  --font-weight-body: 400;
}
```

## Color Palette & Roles

### Primary
- **Primary** (`#493284`): CTAs, interactive elements, brand moments
- **Secondary** (`#ad39d6`): Supporting accents
- **Accent** (`#914267`): Decorative highlights

### Surfaces
- **Background** (`#ffffff`): Page background
- **Surface** (`#f1f0ec`): Cards, elevated elements

### Text
- **Primary** (`#000000`): Headings, strong labels
- **Secondary** (`#42424c`): Body text, descriptions
- **Muted** (`#7c4e6f`): Placeholders, captions

### Semantic
- **Border** (`#efeaf5`): Dividers, container borders
- **Success** (`#91cea5`): Confirmations
- **Warning** (`#f59e0b`): Caution states
- **Error** (`#ef4444`): Destructive actions

## Typography Rules

| Role | Font | Weight | Notes |
|------|------|--------|-------|
| Display | Poiret One | 800 | Hero headlines |
| Heading | Poiret One | 800 | Section titles |
| Body | field-gothic-wide | 400 | Standard text |
| Mono | ui-monospace | 400 | Code, technical |

## Component Stylings

### Buttons
**Primary**
- Background: `#493284`
- Text: `#ffffff`
- Padding: 8px 16px
- Radius: 15px

**Secondary**
- Background: transparent
- Text: `#493284`
- Border: 1px solid `#efeaf5`
- Radius: 15px

### Cards
- Background: `#f1f0ec`
- Border: 1px solid `#efeaf5`
- Radius: 23px
- Shadow: `0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)`

### Inputs
- Background: `#ffffff`
- Border: 1px solid `#efeaf5`
- Radius: 15px
- Focus: 1px solid `#493284`

## Layout Principles

### Spacing Scale
- XS: 4px, SM: 8px, MD: 16px
- LG: 24px, XL: 32px, 2XL: 48px

### Border Radius
- Small: 8px
- Medium: 15px
- Large: 23px
- Full: 9999px

### Shadows
- SM: `0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.05)`
- MD: `0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)`
- LG: `0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0 4px 6px -4px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)`

## Design Decisions (from Mood Profile)

- **Subtle depth**: Moderate shadows for gentle elevation
- **Soft shapes**: Rounded corners, friendly feel
- **Balanced spacing**: Standard rhythm between elements
- **Bold headlines**: Strong visual hierarchy, confident presence

## Agent Prompt Guide

### Quick Reference
- Primary: `#493284`, Background: `#ffffff`
- Heading: Poiret One @ 800, Body: field-gothic-wide @ 400
- Radius: 8px / 15px / 23px
- Spacing: 4px / 8px / 16px / 24px

### CSS Variables (ready to paste)
```css
:root {
  --color-primary: #493284;
  --color-secondary: #ad39d6;
  --color-accent: #914267;
  --color-bg: #ffffff;
  --color-surface: #f1f0ec;
  --color-text: #000000;
  --color-text-secondary: #42424c;
  --color-text-muted: #7c4e6f;
  --color-border: #efeaf5;
  --color-success: #91cea5;
  --color-warning: #f59e0b;
  --color-error: #ef4444;
  --radius-sm: 8px;
  --radius-md: 15px;
  --radius-lg: 23px;
  --shadow-sm: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
  --shadow-md: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
  --shadow-lg: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0 4px 6px -4px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
}
```
